name: Reflex Plus Canned Dog Food - Lamb & Sweet Potato in Gravy 400g
description: Give your adult dog a nutritious and flavorful meal with Reflex Plus Adult Dog Food Lamb & Sweet Potato in Gravy . Made with high-quality Tuna (4%) and carefully selected ingredients, this delicious wet food offers superior nutritional value and digestibility to keep your dog healthy and satisfied. Rich in animal protein and essential vitamins , it supports muscle strength, immune health, and overall vitality. The high moisture content in the gravy helps promote hydration and supports kidney function , while functional ingredients contribute to a shiny coat and optimal digestion. Key Benefits: High-quality lamb protein for strong muscles and easy digestion Enriched with vitamins and minerals for complete nutrition Supports hydration and kidney health with high water content Promotes healthy skin and a glossy coat Suitable for all adult dog breeds Ingredients: Meat and animal derivatives, Fish and fish derivatives (4% White fish), Dried sweet potato (1% dried sweet potato is equivalent to 4% sweet potato), Cereals, Minerals, Derivatives of plant origin. Nutritional Components Crude protein 8% Fat content 5% Crude fiber 0.5% Raw ash 2.5% Moisture Content 80% Nutritional Additives Nutritional supplements: Vitamin A 2250 IU, Vitamin D3 328 IU, Vitamin E 26 mg. Trace Elements: 3b605 (Zinc 24mg/kg), 3b103 (Iron 12.5mg/kg), 3b405 (Copper 2.5mg/kg), 3b503 (Manganese 2mg/kg), 3b202 (Iodine 0.45mg/kg), 3b801 (Selenium 0.04mg/kg). Nutritional Recommendations Serve at room temperature. • Clean, fresh drinking water should always be available. • If this food is new to your dog, introduce it gradually over a few days. • The exact amount of food for your dog may vary depending on many factors such as age, breed, weight, sex, and activity level. • Not suitable for human use.
